panels.title: Areas & Unlock Conditions
rows: Your farm, river fishing, Hot Spring (Caramel Falls — full stamina once/day)
All main shops, most festivals. More shops/NPCs arrive over time.
Residential zone, Maple Lake (exclusive fish). No shops.
Blacksmith, Carpenter's Shop, Praline Forest (herbs/berries/lumber), Ganache Mine
Spring 28 Animal Festival OR Level 3 Hammer
Animal purchases, Souffle Farm, animal care tools
Talk to Gill near log → visit Carpenter's Shop
⚠️ Do NOT examine the root before meeting Dale — causes permanent glitch!
Inn (rare seeds), exotic fruits, unique fish. Ferry: 6AM–10PM, closed Mondays.
Grapes, oranges, Collin sprite, squirrel pet
Unlock West Gull Island first; find Ben's badge here
Best fishing in game (Angler Fish, Shark, Swordfish, Tuna). Go before completing Ben's Rainbow.
Ben's badge from East Gull Island
Second mine, Goddess Spring, Bamboo Shoots, bear/rabbit/weasel/raccoon pets
Fifth sprite, leads to Harvest Goddess tree — final story area

panels.title: Festivals
panels.infobox: Romantic festivals (Fireworks, Firefly, Starry Night) require asking your chosen partner the day before with 3+ hearts. Standing them up costs a full heart level.
rows: Watch sunrise with spouse or alone. Follows New Year's Eve automatically.
⚠️ MEET SELENA here at 10AM+ — miss it and wait a full year! Bug-catching mini-game (talk to Gill). Buy Happy Fertilizer (225G) and Blue Herb Seeds.
**Only place** to buy Grilled Yam & Apple before late Summer/Fall (both needed for Daren's Rainbow). Last call before Summer.
Contest: auto-enters highest-heart animal. 10 hearts = guaranteed prize; 1st place is partially random. **Buy yarns here** (Good Flax/Wool/Silk Yarn) for rucksack upgrades.
Grilled Clam (195G) is loved by 50%+ of villagers — great cheap gifting day.
Ask on Summer 6 (3+ hearts). Location: in front of General Store / beach stairs.
Same stock as Spring Market. Last chance for Apple, Grilled Yam, Omelet.
Ask on Summer 23. Location: waterfall area.
Buy refrigerators here (only 1/size per house, extra storage). Mira's booth has jewelry.
**Buy metals from Julius** (Copper 120G, Silver 165G, Gold 225G) — cheaper than mining for last-tier tool upgrades.
Cooking contest — 1st prize: 10 Bodigizer XLs. Claim from Hamilton before 6PM. Results are largely random regardless of dish quality.
Bachelorette with highest hearts (3+) brings you a cake. Give cakes to others for bonus affection. Shops closed.
Same stock as Fall Market. Last chance for metals and Taylor accessories.
Ask on Winter 24. Location: Alan's Tree at Brownie Ranch (past coop/barn by the sign).
Transported home automatically. Married: 9PM event with spouse. Leads directly into New Year's Sunrise.

panels.title: Weather Guide
panels.infobox: 📺 TV weather: 6AM–10AM and 6PM–10PM show today's/tomorrow's forecast. Call 010 (Weather Forecast) anytime. Gill will warn you about upcoming typhoons/blizzards if you talk to him. **Save the night before** if a typhoon/blizzard is forecast — you can reload to get a different outcome.
rows: Also increases fish catch rates. Good for mining.
⚠️ Crops may be damaged. Can still leave house. **Seasky Fish** only catchable now.
Must water manually despite snow. Can still leave house. **Seasky Fish** only catchable now.
